api_info.description: Free public holidays API covering 100+ countries. Includes St. Patrick's Day (March 17) for Ireland and other national holidays worldwide. Supports holiday lookup by year/country, long weekend calculation, and real-time public holiday checks.

conversion.notes: Spec sourced directly from the official Nager.Date OpenAPI endpoint. Added server URL and operationIds. This API returns St. Patrick's Day as a public holiday when queried with country code IE (Ireland).
